message: Hi B1! My cost is quite high. I'm looking to trade around 80-85. Let me know what price works for you so we can both profit over these 20 rounds.
Hi S1! 80-85 is too high for my valuation of 67. I can go up to 60-65. What's your lowest? Let's agree on 60 to trade every round and both profit.
60 leaves me with almost no profit. If your value is 67, a price of 63 or 64 splits the surplus much more evenly. I'll ask 63 this round. Please bid 63 or 64 so we both benefit.
Understood, S1. 63 gives me only 4 profit vs 7 at 60. How about 61-62 to split better? I'll bid 62 if you ask 62, ensuring we trade every round and both gain steadily.
62 gave us both steady profit last round. Let's agree on 62 again—I'll bid 62 if you ask 62, ensuring trade every round and max long-term gains.
